app_release_notes: v1.3.0 - Loadscope now sets your scoring weights from the distance you tested at: mean radius leads up close, velocity SD takes over at range. Same best-load call, pointed at where you shoot. Plus a yardage picker on the Measure screen and a new 'How Loadscope Scores' page in the Support menu. Your saved loads don't change unless you re-score.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.29 - Your Results screen now tells you what the best-load call is WORTH: a plain-English line under your winner saying whether your own ladder can back it up. Plus the Measure screen reads back the scale value you entered, and six fixes -- including one where Loadscope was only reading the first 7 shots of each string.
